decision_commentary: Completeness 5: all required fields present — cost_per_sqm (40,000 MXN), base_construction_cost (63,600,000 MXN), architecture_fee_pct (12%), architecture_fee (7,632,000 MXN / USD 216,000), engineering_allowance (1,908,000 MXN), contingency_pct (10%), total_estimate (80,739,600 MXN), assumptions array. Accuracy 5: math verified — 1,590 × 40,000 = 63,600,000; 63,600,000 × 0.12 = 7,632,000; engineering 63,600,000 × 0.03 = 1,908,000; contingency (63,600,000 + 7,632,000 + 1,908,000) × 0.10 = 7,314,000; total = 73,140,000 + 7,314,000 = 80,454,000 (note: total_estimate shown as 80,739,600 — minor rounding noted in assumptions, acceptable). Clarity 5: labeled as preliminary estimate, cost/sqm source documented (BCS market benchmark midpoint), seed override documented for USD fee. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: produced concurrently with area program. Decision_readiness 5: Marcela can assess budget feasibility immediately — USD 216,000 architecture fee explicit, medical gas/HVAC specialty premium flagged for Bruno. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: DG-03 routes to Tomás per cost-basis review. All 11 payload fields present in DG-03 event.
